channel.title: Agile on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Agile on Pi Stack

item.title: Plane vs Huly vs Taiga: Best Self-Hosted Project Management Platforms 2026
item.description: Running a software team on SaaS project management tools means paying per seat, accepting feature changes you didn’t ask for, and trusting a third party with your roadmap, sprint data, and internal discussions. Self-hosted project management platforms flip this model: you own the data, control the features, and pay zero per-user fees.
